title: The Broken Code
description: Adds Faces To The broken script R2 & Circuit Inspired By Swayle!
body:
My First Resource Pack and post on modrinth! (CREDIT TO WENDIGORIP THE CREATOR OF TBS)

Adds faces to tbs to r2 & circuit.

Inspired By Swayles Videos so Thank you to him and his team for the great vids and inspiration to make this resource pack

I hope you enjoy, many thanks, beardie!

![Circuit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/370d581b4c68f42eeb16d274f5371e1769c494fc_0.webp)
